params.outcome: The final market outcome (true=YES won, false=NO won)

params._marketMakerAgent: Market maker wallet — receives MM fee
params._oracleAgent: Oracle agent wallet — receives oracle fee

getEstimatedPayout(address,uint256,bool).details: Read-only — does not affect state. Estimate only, not guaranteed.

returns.estimatedPayout: The estimated USDT payout if this direction wins

getPayoutSummary(address).details: Returns empty struct if market has not been distributed yet
